roundup.title: Gemma 4 QAT & Nemotron 3 Ultra Land
roundup.subtitle: Gemma 4 QAT 与 Nemotron 3 Ultra 同步发布
headline: @GoogleAI 与 @UnslothAI 共同推动 Gemma 4 系列 QAT 量化模型上线，26B-A4B 版本可在 16GB RAM 设备运行，显著降低本地部署门槛。@danielhanchen 实测显示 Unsloth 动态 GGUF 可恢复大部分精度损失。
@nvidia 与 @vllm_project 发布 Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B MoE 模型，专为长时 Agent 设计，支持 1M context，已登陆 Perplexity 与 OpenRouter。@perplexity_ai 与 @PrimeIntellect 同步提供量化与 RL 基础设施支持。
@claudeai 与 @testingcatalog 确认 Claude Cowork 配额翻倍至 7 月 5 日，@AnthropicAI 同时展示 Mythos Preview 在代码加速任务中达到 52x 提升，预示新模型家族即将独立发布。
@SakanaAILabs 宣布成立 RSI Lab，聚焦 LLM² 与 Darwin Gödel Machine 等自改进技术，@GoogleResearch 同期推出多 Agentic RAG 框架，共同指向 Agent 生产化基础设施加速成熟。

deepDives.title: Gemma 4 QAT 量化模型正式发布
deepDives.summary: Google 推出 23 个 Gemma 4 QAT 检查点，支持消费级 GPU 与移动端本地运行，Unsloth 提供动态 GGUF 进一步恢复精度。

facts.text: Gemma 4 26B-A4B 可在 16GB RAM 设备运行
Unsloth 动态 GGUF 使 26B-A4B top-1 精度从 70.2% 提升至 85.6%
31B 模型精度从 87.9% 提升至 96.7%

bullish.text: 精度恢复显著，适合边缘部署

deepDives.title: Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B MoE 上线
deepDives.summary: NVIDIA 发布专为长时 Agent 设计的 550B MoE 开源模型，vLLM Day-0 支持并提供 FP8/W4A16 量化版本。

facts.text: vLLM 提供 Day-0 支持
facts.quote: Day-0 support for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra on vLLM

bullish.text: 长上下文 Agent 推理性能值得期待

bullets.text: LangSmith 支持一键部署 Google ADK Agent
LangGraph 新增重试与超时机制提升 Agent 容错
Red Hat Speculators v0.5.0 支持 DFlash 训练 Gemma 4 31B
turbopuffer 向量分支功能实现 440ms 克隆
Cursor Design Mode 支持视觉提示更新 UI
Grok Build v0.2.31 大幅提升大型仓库 Grep 速度

topTweets.author: @UnslothAI
topTweets.text: Gemma 4 QAT 支持 16GB RAM 本地运行
topTweets.whyItMatters: 首次实现 Gemma 4 系列低内存本地部署

topTweets.author: @danielhanchen
topTweets.text: Unsloth GGUF 恢复 Gemma 4 精度最高 +15.4%
topTweets.whyItMatters: 量化后精度恢复数据对工程师有直接参考价值

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: vLLM Day-0 支持 Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B
topTweets.whyItMatters: 550B MoE 长上下文模型推理即用

topTweets.author: @SakanaAILabs
topTweets.text: 成立 RSI Lab 推动 AI 自我改进研究
topTweets.whyItMatters: 自改进 Agent 研究新平台

topTweets.author: @GoogleResearch
topTweets.text: 发布多 Agentic RAG 框架
topTweets.whyItMatters: 企业级复杂查询多代理解决方案

takeaways: Gemma 4 QAT 使 26B 模型可在消费级硬件运行，AI Engineer 可优先测试本地 Agent 原型。
Nemotron 3 Ultra 1M context + vLLM 支持，适合构建长时运行 Agent 工作流。
Claude Cowork 配额翻倍期间可用于更大规模代码与研究任务验证。
关注 Sakana RSI Lab 与 Google 多 Agent RAG 框架，下一代 Agent 基础设施已现雏形。

items.author: @ArtificialAnlys
items.text: Google’s newly released open weights model, Gemma 4 12B, supports transcription but is far from the frontier, scoring 8.8% on AA-WER (#58)
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B 语音转录基准：8.8% WER，开放权重新基准数据

items.author: @NousResearch
items.text: Check out the creative skills Optional: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/reference/optional-skills-catalog#creative Bundled: https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/reference/skills-catalog#creative
items.whyItMatters: Hermes Agent创意技能目录开源

items.author: @MiniMax_AI
items.text: $0.07 for M3, $3.39 for Opus. Both caught 13 of 17 bugs. Really interesting breakdown from @kilocode Definitely worth the read
items.whyItMatters: MiniMax M3代码审计性价比碾压Claude

items.author: @elonmusk
items.text: Grok Build update just released v0.2.31 Release Notes: Bug Fixes: • Marketplace skills... Performance: • Grep searches on large repositories are now substantially faster...
items.whyItMatters: Grok Build v0.2.31 Grep性能优化

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Speculators v0.5.0 ships DFlash training support. The Red Hat AI team trained a Gemma 4 31B speculator with it. It beats Eagle 3 and a standalone FP8 quantized verifier on inter-token latency.
items.whyItMatters: 新训练方法显著降低推理延迟，vLLM 即用。

items.author: @aiDotEngineer
items.whyItMatters: AI Agent 驱动的代码库重构案例，单日 3000 commits，展示 agentic coding 规模。

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: There’s a ton of interest in custom model tuning as agents reach production and scale up. Here is how we made Databricks Knowledge Assistant 3x faster using our new Instructed Retriever model trained end-to-end to do parallel test-time compute. It’s rolling out to customers now!
items.whyItMatters: Databricks 并行测试时计算检索器，3x 加速

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: Glorious New Nippon Models, folded over 1000 times. 👺 (quoting Liquid AI Japanese LFM2.5-Audio-1.5B-JP and LFM2.5-1.2B-JP-202606 releases with benchmarks)
items.whyItMatters: 日语端到端语音+语言模型发布，本地/多语言模型新选择

items.author: @testingcatalog
items.text: BREAKING 🔥: A new Claude Mythos 5 model slug has been spotted via Dev Mode. Claude Mythos is planned to be released as its own model class, besides Haiku, Sonnet and Opus model families. Soon? 👀
items.whyItMatters: 新模型家族预告，AI工程师关注Claude路线图

items.author: @testingcatalog
items.text: ANTHROPIC 🔥: Claude Cowork limits have been doubled until July 5 for all paid plans. Cowork time 👀
items.whyItMatters: 付费用户Cowork配额翻倍，提升Agent使用上限

items.author: @skalskip92
items.text: supervision just hit 40,000 GitHub stars! it now powers over 6.5k open-source computer vision projects, including all my demos like basketball AI link: https://github.com/roboflow/supervision
items.whyItMatters: CV开源库40k星，6.5k项目依赖，实用工具更新

items.author: @TheZachMueller
items.text: For this particular one, I wanted to setup a similar situation to the report from their paper: 8k in, 32k out, concurrency 256. The results were very interesting. On 4x B200: TRT-LLM: 3,400 tok/s, 13tok/s/user vLLM: 2,600 tok/s, 9tok/s/user SGL: 2,400 tok/s, 9tok/s/user
items.whyItMatters: B200上主流推理引擎基准对比，tok/s实测数据

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: GBrain as your company brain If I were setting one up for a company, this is what I would ingest / configure first: 1. Source-of-truth docs ... 8. Feedback loops
items.whyItMatters: 企业级Agent知识库与工作流配置框架，实用落地指南

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: New Anthropic Science Blog: Making Claude a chemist. ... We found Opus 4.7 matches—and on some tasks beats—dedicated NMR software.
items.whyItMatters: Claude 在 NMR 分子结构任务上媲美专业软件

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: With Design Mode, you can now point, draw, or talk to update your UI. ... Give Cursor visual prompts to shrink the gap between what you see and what the agent understands.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor 新增视觉提示 Design Mode，提升 UI 迭代效率

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: You can now deploy Google ADK agents to LangSmith! Wrap your ADK agent with one function call and deploy it to managed infra, with built in: ✅ Session persistence ✅ Streaming ✅ Tracing
items.whyItMatters: LangSmith 一键部署 Google ADK Agent，支持持久化与追踪

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Nemotron 3 Ultra is now available for Pro and Max subscribers on Perplexity and Computer. It's @nvidia's new open model built for long-running agents.
items.whyItMatters: 新开源长上下文Agent模型上线Perplexity

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: We've doubled usage limits in Claude Cowork for the next month. Delegate bigger, more complex tasks to Claude.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Cowork使用限额翻倍，支持更复杂Agent任务

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: Google releases Gemma 4 QAT. You can now run Gemma 4 at 3x less memory with near original performance. Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) makes it possible to run Gemma 4 26B-A4B on 16GB RAM.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 QAT支持16GB RAM本地运行

items.author: @sydneyrunkle
items.text: why should you give your agent a sandbox? giving an agent code execution power allows it to solve problems more creatively (custom code rather than set tools) and efficiently (optimal context window usage)
items.whyItMatters: Agent沙箱执行提升创造力与效率

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: Building AI that Builds AI: Introducing the Sakana AI RSI Lab 🚀 https://sakana.ai/rsi-lab/ Today, we are announcing the Sakana AI Recursive Self-Improvement (RSI) Lab... unifying breakthroughs like LLM², Darwin Gödel Machine, ShinkaEvolve, ALE-Agent... tasked with building open-ended, adaptive architectures that colle
items.whyItMatters: 宣布RSI Lab，推动AI自我改进研究

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: Introducing our new agentic RAG framework. A collab with Google Cloud, our multi-agent workflow goes beyond standard RAG by breaking down complex enterprise queries & iteratively searching for sufficient context before generating dependable responses.
items.whyItMatters: 发布多Agentic RAG框架，提升企业查询可靠性

items.author: @dl_weekly
items.text: 🤖 : A Cursor engineering retrospective on a year of shipping cloud agents, arguing the work is less "local agent on a server" and more building a full operating layer, covering environment fidelity, durable execution via Temporal, etc.https://cursor.com/blog/cloud-agent-lessons
items.whyItMatters: Cursor云Agent一年回顾：构建完整操作系统层

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text:
Live on OpenRouter: Riverflow 2.5 from @riverflow_ai

The first image model with an independent scoring rubric you control to guide its thinking and editing, with controllable reasoning effort to trade speed for quality.

Free until Tuesday June 9. Fast and Pro below 🧵
items.whyItMatters: 新图像模型带可控推理与评分 rubric，免费试用

items.author: @github
items.text:
The way we build software has changed.

Again.

Good thing developers love learning new tricks.

GitHub Universe is back to help you navigate the age of AI agents.
items.whyItMatters: GitHub Universe 回归，聚焦 AI Agent 时代

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text:
You can now create and edit images directly in Gemini Live.

Whether testing out room decor, getting help with math, or creating shareable memes, it all happens in real-time.
items.whyItMatters: Gemini Live 实时图像创建与编辑上线

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: Nobody is asking who makes the <$1 multi-layer ceramic capacitor (MLCC) that keeps voltage stable across every chip in the rack... AI server MLCC demand is growing ~5x by CY27.
items.whyItMatters: AI 服务器 MLCC 瓶颈，需求 5 倍增长

items.author: @DrJimFan
items.text: NitroGen just won CVPR Best Paper Honorable Mention!! We are making strides towards general-purpose embodied agents that master not only the real world physics, but also all possible physics across a multiverse of simulations. It’s been 4 years since MineDojo...
items.whyItMatters: CVPR获奖具身智能Agent新突破

items.author: @danielhanchen
items.text: Gemma-4 QAT just dropped! We found if you naively convert from QAT Q4_0 BF16, you will lose accuracy... Unsloth dynamic GGUFs recovers most of it! 26B-A4B: 85.6% top-1 % from 70.2% (+15.4%) 31B: 96.7% from 87.9% (+8.8%)
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 QAT+Unsloth GGUF精度提升

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: Here’s this week’s shipping recap 👇 — Nano Banana 2 & Nano Banana Pro are now GA... —Co-Scientist, our new multi-agent system... — @GoogleGemma 4 12B... — Gemma 4 models... optimized with Quantization-Aware Training... — @GoogleMagenta RealTime 2...
items.whyItMatters: Google多款AI模型与Agent更新，含Gemma 4与多Agent系统

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: Current state of the art silicon processes are optimized for maximum performance per wafer, but if the world is going to be wafer constrained, I wonder if designs could be changed to use fewer layers...
items.whyItMatters: 讨论晶圆约束下AI芯片设计优化思路

items.author: @AIatMeta
items.text: Big congrats to our SAM 3D team for receiving a Best Paper Honorable Mention at #CVPR26! ... Read the paper here: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.16624
items.whyItMatters: Meta SAM 3D论文获CVPR最佳论文提名

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: We're excited to join the NVIDIA Nemotron Coalition 💚 Frontier open models matter for the whole ecosystem. We're bringing the RL infrastructure and environments we've built over the last year to help scale agentic capabilities.
items.whyItMatters: 开源 RL 基础设施支持 Nemotron 3 Ultra，加速自改进 Agent。

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: 50 Crowns. A fully AI-generated in-game cinematic following two bounty hunters on the road. Created with Runway in less than a week by just one person.
items.whyItMatters: 单人一周产出高质量 AI 视频内容，展示产品能力。

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Quantized checkpoints for Nemotron 3 Ultra are up on HuggingFace. FP8 Dynamic, FP8 Block, and W4A16 G128. All three ready to serve with @vllm_project.
items.whyItMatters: 提供多格式量化模型，vLLM 直接部署优化推理。

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: Your monthly reminder that HF is much cheaper at scale, for both storage and egress (especially if you use several cloud providers for compute) than S3, GCS, and even Backblaze.
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face 存储成本优势，适合大规模 AI 数据。

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
new: branching
create an instant, copy-on-write clone of a tpuf namespace
→ constant-time (440ms p50, ~1s p99)
→ fully independent
→ unlimited branches, unlimited branch depth
docs: https://turbopuffer.com/docs/branching
items.whyItMatters: 向量数据库新增分支功能，支持秒级克隆，适合 AI 实验与生产迭代。

items.author: @wandb
items.text:
To test an AI agent, you run it in a sandbox: a throwaway cloud machine where it does the real work.
Harbor, the framework most top labs use to run those tests, just added CoreWeave Sandboxes as an option.
Switching takes one line of code.
items.whyItMatters: 主流 AI Agent 测试框架 Harbor 新增 CoreWeave 支持，一行代码切换沙箱环境。

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: New @GoogleGemma 4 QAT (Quantization-Aware Training) checkpoints are here, so you can run models locally on consumer GPUs and mobile devices with minimal quality loss.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 QAT量化checkpoint，支持本地/移动端

items.author: @lmstudio
items.text: Gemma 4 QAT is here. Available for all sizes of Gemma 4, optimized with Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) to reduce memory requirements while preserving performance. Live now in LM Studio. https://lmstudio.ai/models/gemma-4
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 QAT 本地优化模型发布，支持边缘设备

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: Google just dropped 23 new Gemma 4 models on @huggingface 🤯 Quantization-Aware Training checkpoints that run locally on edge devices + consumer GPUs, without the usual quality hit from quantization. Gemma 4 E2B now fits in ~1GB of memory.
items.whyItMatters: HF 上线 23 个 Gemma 4 QAT 模型，极致本地化

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Sovereign AI at population scale isn’t theory anymore, it’s shipping. Sarvam AI is building a full-stack, “Made in India” AI platform that: 🧠 Trains 100B+ parameter MoE models efficiently across 4,096+ NVIDIA H100 GPUs ⚡ Delivers millisecond-level, multilingual voice inference for Aadhaar 📞 Powers automated KYC, sale
items.whyItMatters: 展示主权AI规模化落地案例，AI工程师可参考多语言Agent工作流

items.author: @mntruell
items.text: Working with agents should feel like working with a colleague. You should be able “speak to” them not just with text chats, but by gesturing at a screen together, talking live, etc.
items.whyItMatters: Cursor Design Mode多模态Agent交互，coding workflow升级

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: Each time we release a model, we run the same test: give it code that trains a small AI model, ask the new model to speed it up. ... In May 2024, Claude Opus 4 averaged a ~3x speedup. This April, Mythos Preview achieved ~52x.
items.whyItMatters: Mythos Preview 52x 代码加速，展示 AI 自我改进潜力

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: 🚀 Day-0 support for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra on vLLM! ... 550B MoE frontier-intelligence open model built for long-running agents.
items.whyItMatters: vLLM 首发支持 550B Nemotron 3 Ultra，长上下文 Agent 推理

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: The new memory system will keep track of important details automatically. ... The new memory system is rolling out to Plus and Pro users in the US today, along with 2x more memory.
items.whyItMatters: ChatGPT 新内存系统上线，2x 容量+更好上下文控制

items.author: @UnslothAI
items.text: You can now run NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, a new 550B open model. Nemotron-3-Ultra-550B-A55B is NVIDIA's largest LLM yet, with 1M context, frontier coding & chat.
items.whyItMatters: Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B开源模型支持本地GGUF

items.author: @dejavucoder
items.text: arena dot ai introduced agent mode and they are recording live sessions of users who use the agent mode. interesting thread on how they evaluate performance and model rankings plus breakdown of how models r used etc.
items.whyItMatters: Arena.ai Agent模式实时评估与模型排名

items.author: @cohere
items.text: Proud to announce that Cohere has been awarded first place in NATO’s Agentic AI for Cognitive Warfare Innovation Challenge.
items.whyItMatters: Cohere 获 NATO Agentic AI 挑战赛第一

items.author: @JeffDean
items.text: Check out our Gemma 4 12B model: it's a super capable open weights model that can run directly on your laptop.
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B开源多模态笔记本运行

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: New course on serving LLMs efficiently -- how do you serve models to many concurrent users at low latency and reasonable cost? This short course is built with @RedHat and taught by @cedricclyburn. ... Join and learn to serve LLMs efficiently:
items.whyItMatters: vLLM+量化高效LLM serving课程

items.author: @fal
items.text: Sonilo v1.1 is live on fal. A professionally licensed video-to-music AI model... Upload a video, get music that matches its pacing, emotion, and story instantly.
items.whyItMatters: 视频转音乐AI模型v1.1上线，支持fal平台快速生成

items.author: @LangChain_OSS
items.text: One of the most common questions we get from agent builders is how to make agents resilient to failures, so we wrote a guide!
items.whyItMatters: 提供构建容错 Agent 的实用指南，提升生产可靠性。

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text:
tpuf quantizes vectors to improve perf (RaBitQ)
...we rebuilt the rotation using FWHT at O(d) space & O(d log d) time. ~no recall loss, 10k = only 5kB in RAM
items.whyItMatters: 优化向量量化算法，大幅降低高维内存占用，提升推理性能。

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: Everything we shipped in May, in 2 minutes. 🎥 Follow the changelog for more: https://www.assemblyai.com/changelog
items.whyItMatters: 语音AI产品5月更新汇总，工程师关注API演进

items.author: @aye_aye_kaplan
items.text: Check out mine here: https://cursor.com/@jonk Who has me beat on token count?
items.whyItMatters: Cursor新Profiles功能，token使用可视化

items.author: @basecampbernie
items.text: Gemma4 12B 256K on an RTX 4090, q8 quant 48 t/s
items.whyItMatters: Gemma 4 12B本地4090实测性能数据

items.author: @bromann
items.text: LangGraph powers our agent primitives... Retries, timeouts, and error handlers are now even better in LangGraph, making it easier for agents to recover gracefully
items.whyItMatters: LangGraph Agent生产级可靠性升级

items.author: @lmstudio
items.text: Locally is now LM Studio’s mobile app. And today we're bringing LM Link to iPhone. Use your largest local models over a secure, end-to-end encrypted connection, anywhere you go.
items.whyItMatters: LM Studio 推出 iOS 移动端，支持本地大模型

items.author: @hwchase17
items.text: langchain create_agent is a super minimal agent harness very easy to customize with... middleware!!! as you build task-specific harnesses, great to know - check it out below!
items.whyItMatters: LangChain最小Agent harness支持middleware定制
